title: Meow Create
description: ⚙️ A Forge 1.20.1 modpack blending Create engineering 🏗️ with Scorched Guns combat 🔫. Experience realistic Genetic Animals 🧬, brave the Pale Garden 👻, and master the wild! 🌾
body:
# ⚙️ Meow Create Modpack A **Forge**-based modpack for **Minecraft 1.20.1**, built around the **Create mod** and expanded with automation, wildlife, world generation, cooking, decoration, quality-of-life improvements, and performance optimizations. Designed for players who want to combine **engineering, survival, and exploration** into one balanced experience. --- ## 📌 Version Info * **1.1.x or lower** – Development builds. * **1.2** – Genetics focus *(Realistic Horse Genetics, Animal Genetics, Snekcraft)*. * **1.3** – DragN’s Livestock & Pets integration. --- ## ✨ Core Features ### 🏗️ Create & Engineering Harness the full Create ecosystem with a wide selection of addons and integrations: * **Expansions:** Create Food, Create New Age, Railways Navigator, Big Cannons. * **Addons:** Create Deco, Stuff & Additions, Enchantment Industry, Ore Excavation, Central Kitchen, Connected, Copper & Zinc, **Power Loader**, Jetpack, Mechanical Companion, Structures, Misc & Things, Utilities, Enchantable Machinery, Armor Trims, Deep Dark, Sound of Steam. * **Special Content:** Oppenheimered (nuclear), Mechanical Spawner, Tweaked Controllers, Oxidized. ### 🐾 Wildlife, Mobs & World Populate the world with diverse creatures and fresh challenges: * **Fauna:** Alex’s Mobs, Alex’s Caves, New Age Alex’s Caves. * **Overhauls & Enemies:** Creeper Overhaul, Enderman Overhaul, Illager Invasion, Horseman, Golems Are Friends. * **Genetics & Animals:** * **Genetic Animals:** Animals have unique genes, sizes, and produce. * **Realistic Horse Genetics:** Breed horses with real coats and stats. * **Companions:** **Better Dogs** & **Blue's Better Cats**. * **DragN’s Livestock & Pet Overhaul:** Enhanced farming behavior. * **World & Biomes:** Biomes O’ Plenty, Climate Rivers, **Pale Garden Backport** (The Garden Awakens). * **Villages:** Dynamic Village, Villages and Pillages. ### 🔫 Combat & Defense * **Scorched Guns 2:** Defend your base with realistic firearms, turrets, and ammo. * **Threats:** Enhanced mobs from ScGuns and tougher raids. ### 🌾 Farming & Food Realistic farming and cooking systems with Create integration: * Farmer’s Delight, Create Food, Slice and Dice (automatic harvesting). * Bountiful (quests and bounty boards). ### 🏠 Decoration & Structures Enhance builds and landscapes with rich visuals: * Copycats, Interiors, Sawmill, Some More Blocks. * Better Archaeology, Archaeology Banners. * Underground Rooms, Trials (Trial Chambers), Tide, **YUNG's Structures** (Mineshafts, Bridges, Extras). ### 🧰 Quality of Life Practical improvements for smoother gameplay: * **Inventory/UI:** AppleSkin, Jade (+ Addons), Mouse Tweaks, Carry On, BetterF3, 3D Skin Layers. * **Interaction:** Double Doors, PickUp Notifier, Stack Refill, Grabby Mobs, Portable Wardrobe Armor Swap. * **Utilities:** Comforts, Waystones, Visual Workbench, Natures Compass, Trading Post, Trade Cycling. * **Tweaks:** Easy Magic, Easy Anvils, Easy Disenchanting, Cut Through, Healing Campfire, No Hostiles Around Campfire. ### ⚡ Performance Optimization Stable performance even with a high mod count: * FerriteCore, Embeddium, ImmediatelyFast, ModernFix, Radium. * Memory Leak Fix, Model Fix, Chunky. --- ## 💡 Why Choose *Meow Create*? If you love the **Create mod** and want a rich survival experience where automation, realism, and creativity thrive — this pack is your perfect playground. Whether you focus on building machines, farming crops, taming creatures, or decorating your world, **Meow Create** gives you all the tools to make it happen. --- # 🎮 Keybinds & Controls Guide ### 🎒 Inventory Management *Advanced sorting, moving items, and managing profiles.* **General Inventory** - **S** – Sort inventory - **S + C** – Sort in columns (`|`) - **S + R** – Sort in rows (`-`) - **Shift + A** – Move all similar items to container - **Shift + Q** – Drop all similar items - **H** – Toggle highlight for item under cursor - **Shift + H** – Toggle blinking highlight - **C + N** – Copy NBT of item - **C + I** – Copy ID of item - **P + N** – Print NBT into the chat **Mouse Shortcuts (Scrolling)** - **Scroll Up/Down** – Move item between Player and Chest - **Shift + Scroll** – Move whole stack - **Z + Scroll** – Move stack but leave one behind - **X + Scroll** – Spread items equally into empty spaces - **C + Scroll** – Drop items while moving **Inventory Profiles (Quick Swaps)** - **P + C** – Apply current profile - **P + [** or **]** – Cycle previous/next profile - **P + 1 / 2 / 3** – Apply specific profile 1, 2, or 3 > **How to set up a Custom Profile (e.g., Mining):** > 1. Arrange your hotbar exactly how you want it for mining. > 2. Press **P + S** to save the setup. > 3. Open **Profiles Config**. > 4. Rename the profile "Saved" to "Mining". > 5. Set "Quick Profile 1 Name" to "Mining". > *(Note: Pressing P + S always overwrites the "Saved" slot, so renaming it creates a permanent copy).* ### ⚔️ Combat & Weapons - **R** – Reload gun (Scorched Guns) - **U** – Unload gun - **H** – Swap ammo type - **Z** – Modify attachments / Check Ammo - **X** – Inspect weapon - **V** – Melee attack / Quiver access (if bow equipped) - **Exo Armor:** `,` (Boots), `.` (Chestplate), `/` (Helmet) - **G** – Alex's Caves special ability ### 🐴 Movement & Mounts **Horses & Animals** - **Left Ctrl** – Speed up horse - **Left Alt** – Slow down horse - **S** – Walk backwards - **Down Arrow** – Spanish Walk (Trick) - **Space** – Switch Plow/Mower mode - **R** – Dismount **Trains & Carriages** - **C** – Cruise control (Trains) / Change carriage mode - **V** – Descend (Trains) - **Left Alt** – Open Bogey menu / Cycle menu - **Left Click** – Fire controlled cannon **Flying & Sailing** - **Space** – Flap (Wings) - **Left Shift** – Flare (Wings) - **R** – Toggle Sail - **F8** – Toggle Flight mode (Immersive Aircraft) - **B** – Rocket Boost ### 🌍 World Interaction & Utility - **M** – Open Map - **= / -** – Map Zoom Out / In - **R** – Show route overlay options - **Shift + Right Click** – Carry On (Pick up entity/block) - **Left Alt** – Access nearby toolboxes - **W** – Ponder (Create Mod help) - **N** – Open Portable Wardrobe - **B** – Open Backpack (Middle click to sort) - **J** – Clear active toast notifications - **;** – Open MIDI config - **F10** – Toggle Widget position **Villager Trading** - **C** – Cycle trades - **G** – Add trade to Global bookmark (**Shift+G** for all) - **L** – Add trade to Local bookmark (**Shift+L** for all) ### ⚙️ Config Shortcuts - **R + C** – Open Mod Config Menu - **R + Z** – Reload Mod Config - **R + G** – GUI Overlay Config
